sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_fqdn (id UInt64, domain String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_fqdn (id, domain) VALUES (1, fqdn());
UPDATE test_fqdn SET domain = fqdn() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, domain FROM test_fqdn WHERE domain = fqdn();
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_fqdn WHERE domain IS NOT NULL;
